title: AxiomMC Modpack
description: Just the modpack for the server
body:
# AxiomMC Server Modpack

**The AxiomMC Server Modpack** is a lightweight, performance-focused modpack designed to enhance the server experience while improving FPS, stability, and overall quality of life. It includes a curated set of optimization, visual, and utility mods to ensure smooth gameplay without unnecessary bloat.

> ⚠️ **Lunar Client Notice**  
> Due to a known issue with **Lunar Client**, resource packs included in the `Modpack` may **not automatically load** when installing this modpack.  
>  
> If the resource packs do not appear in-game, you can manually download them using the **resource pack links provided below** and add them to your resource packs folder.

---

<details>
<summary>Lunar Client Install Tutorial</summary>

### How to install the Modpack on Lunar Client

After downloading the **modpack**, open **Lunar Client** and go to the **Versions** page.

![Lunar Client Tutorial #1](https://i.imgur.com/4J7fxps.png)

Then navigate to the **Modpacks** section.

![Lunar Client Tutorial #2](https://i.imgur.com/UpXY3do.png)

Drag the **.mrpack file** into the modpack area and launch the game.

![Lunar Client Tutorial #3](https://i.imgur.com/OJ1Ccl2.png)

Once installed, press play and join the server.

> ⚠️ If the resource packs do not appear in-game on Lunar Client, download them manually using the links below and enable them in the resource packs menu.
</details>
